results.title: List of all capital cities of the world - Worlddata.info
results.snippet: # All capitals in the world. But in the case of small Caribbean or Oceanian islands, most of us will start struggling. Here is the list of all capital cities in the world, grouped by their continent. All population figures refer to the city proper or urban agglomeration, but not to metropolitan regions. The population figures given refer primarily to the actual city boundaries. The urban area corresponds to the definition of the United Nations, in which surrounding areas are also included in an agglomeration if the development or settlement cannot or can hardly be separated from the city proper. It happens that the population of the agglomeration is lower than that of the administrative city area. ## Capital cities in Europe. | Austria | Vienna | 1,926,960 | 2,226,795 |. | Belgium | Brussels | 197,000 | 1,253,178 |. | France | Paris | 2,133,111 | 10,890,751 |. | Hungary | Budapest | 1,685,342 | 1,671,004 |.
